checks.rule: Say official KuJiaLe / InteriorAgent scenes, not broad GRScenes/R2R/MP3D benchmark.
Only claim multi-scene performance after official-scene repeated runs exist.
Use selected videos as qualitative evidence only; full metric runs remain authoritative.
Do not imply an official-scene NVIDIA baseline unless those converted scenes are generated and benchmarked.
Keep clearcoat selected-failure and procedural-texture limitation language.
Verify official InternNav / InteriorAgent / KuJiaLe provenance and target venue citations.
